ai.title: Report: NSA Taps Anthropic AI Amid War Dept Risk Warning

ai.description: A slew of entertainment news takes center stage: Comedy legend Eddie Murphy received the AFI Life Achievement Award. French actress Nathalie Baye has passed away at 77. The Indian epic 'Ramayana' aims to reach global audiences. An AI-driven film featuring Val Kilmer sparks ethical discussions. Meta plans significant workforce layoffs, while a Kanye West concert in Switzerland gets canceled amid controversies.
